scripts.sync: rsync -a --delete --exclude='contact/' --exclude='constitution/' journal/_includes/ _includes/ && rsync -a --delete journal/_layouts/ _layouts/ && rsync -a --delete journal/_plugins/ _plugins/ && rsync -a --delete journal/css/ css/ && rsync -a --delete journal/js/ js/ && rsync -a --delete journal/fonts/ fonts/ && rsync -a --delete journal/img/ img/
scripts.serve: npm run sync && bundle exec jekyll serve --config journal/_config.yml,_config.yml
scripts.build: npm run sync && bundle exec jekyll build --config journal/_config.yml,_config.yml --trace
scripts.prebuild: npm run stat-pieces && npm run stat-paragraphs && npm run stat-history
